title: Send a shielded ZEC payment end-to-end
description:
All work needed to go from /pay to a confirmed on-chain shielded transaction.

Infrastructure already complete: params download (nie-bqe), gRPC broadcast (nie-5kc), fee + note selection (nie-zz8), balance query (nie-8t7), block scanner (nie-bgc), address generation (nie-adl, nie-8jv).

Remaining work:
1. nie-wdw: build_shielded_tx — spend proofs, SaplingBuilder, serialize to raw bytes
2. nie-22n: send_payment() — compose builder + memo + broadcast, sync-lag guard
3. nie-3no: testnet E2E — alice funds, bob receives, confirm fires, script is PASS

This epic is done when a /pay command results in a confirmed shielded transaction on testnet.
notes: Phase 1 (research) and Phase 3 (test framework) complete. nie-3no payment test is blocked on scanner improvements nie-gw8k and agoraold-7766. Full E2E payment requires IVK note decryption + Merkle witness tracking before it can run.
